seoTitle: Haystack vs Haywards Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Haystack and Haywards Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Haystack vs Haywards Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Haystack and Haywards Bay.
heading: Haystack vs Haywards Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Haystack, New South Wales and Haywards Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Haystack has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Haywards Bay (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Haystack or Haywards Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Haystack has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Haywards Bay scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Haystack scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Haywards Bay scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Haystack or Haywards Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Haystack has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
